product_highlights: Capixyl™ — clinically validated hair growth peptide active
Specialty lipid actives for scalp penetration
Hair care delivery systems for enhanced efficacy
Anti-hair loss ingredient systems with clinical data
notes: Lucas Meyer Cosmetics (part of Clariant) is a French cosmetic active ingredient specialist with a strong portfolio of hair and scalp care actives. As the distributor of Capixyl™, they provide one of the most clinically validated hair growth actives on the market. Their lipid-based delivery systems enhance the penetration and efficacy of hair care actives into the scalp and hair follicle.
